## Description
Convert to Progressive Web App with offline support.

## Benefits
- Install on mobile devices
- Offline functionality
- Native app-like experience

## Implementation Tasks
- [ ] Add service worker
- [ ] Configure manifest.json
- [ ] Implement offline data sync
- [ ] Add install prompts
